name: hula-orchestration
description: Can the assistant emit a short HuLa IR plan: parallel gather (par + calls) then conditional (branch with then/else)? Scored by LLM judge in static eval and harness.
default_rubric: Pass if the reply contains a coherent HuLa-shaped JSON tree: top-level name/version/root; root uses seq; includes par with at least three call children; includes branch with pred and both then and else subtrees (then often seq+call, else emit or call). Accept minor field order or extra harmless fields. Fail if only prose, wrong op vocabulary, missing parallel or missing branch, or invalid JSON.

tasks.prompt: Design a minimal HuLa program (JSON only) for Human's agent IR. Requirements: top-level object with keys "name" (string), "version" (number), "root" (node). Root node: op "seq", id "main", "children" array with exactly two elements in order: (1) op "par" with at least three children each op "call" with id, tool (string), and args (object)—use placeholder tools like search_web, search_news, search_papers; (2) op "branch" with id, "pred" string (e.g. "success"), "then" object that is op "seq" containing at least one op "call", and "else" object that is either op "emit" (with emit_key and emit_value) or op "call". Output raw JSON only—no markdown code fences, no commentary.
tasks.expected: Valid JSON with name, version, root.seq containing par>=3 calls then branch with then and else subtrees as specified.
tasks.rubric: 5=Valid JSON + par with 3+ calls + branch with then seq+call and else emit/call; 3=Right shape but one structural gap; 1=Prose only or missing par/branch

tasks.prompt:
This HuLa program is incomplete: it has a seq with only a par of two calls. Extend it to full JSON: keep existing nodes, then add as the second child of the root seq a branch node with pred "success", then: seq with one call id "summarize" tool "summarize" args {"text":"combined"}, else: emit with emit_key "error" and emit_value "gather failed". Return the complete program JSON only (no markdown).

{"name":"gather_then_decide","version":1,"root":{"op":"seq","id":"main","children":[{"op":"par","id":"gather","children":[{"op":"call","id":"a","tool":"fetch","args":{}},{"op":"call","id":"b","tool":"fetch","args":{}}]}]}}
tasks.expected: Same program extended: root seq has two children: original par, then branch with then/else as specified.
tasks.rubric: 5=Preserves par + adds branch with summarize seq and error emit; 3=Branch present but wrong wiring; 1=No branch or broken JSON
